doc: # TODO Send SetupConnection with bad fields and flags (all possible invalid fields and flags)
# TODO Assert that pleblottery responds with SetupConnection.Error (all possible invalid fields and flags)
Send SetupConnection with good fields and flags
Assert that pleblottery responds with SetupConnection.Success
# TODO Send OpenStandardMiningChannel with bad flags (all possible invalid fields)
# TODO Assert that pleblottery responds with OpenStandardMiningChannel.Error (all possible invalid fields)
Assert that pleblottery responds with OpenStandardMiningChannel.Success
# TODO Send UpdateChannel with bad fields (all possible invalid fields)
# TODO Assert that pleblottery responds with UpdateChannel.Error
Send UpdateChannel with bad fields (all possible invalid fields)
(possible?) Assert that pleblottery does NOT respond with Update.Error
# TODO Send SubmitSharesStandard with bad fields (all possible invalid fields)
# TODO Assert that pleblottery responds with SubmitSharesStandard.Error
Assert that pleblottery responds with SubmitSharesStandard.Success

actions.actiondoc: This action sends a SetupConnection and asserts that a SetupConnection.Success message is received
